specs.tlaContent:
---- MODULE L2_auth ----
VARIABLES state, token
Init ==
    /\ state = "init"
    /\ token = FALSE

Register ==
    /\ state = "init"
    /\ state' = "registered"
    /\ token' = FALSE

Next ==
    \/ Register

BusinessInvariant ==
    /\ TypeInvariant
    /\ TokenIssuedRequiresAuthenticated

TypeInvariant ==
    state \in {"init", "registered"}

TokenIssuedRequiresAuthenticated ==
    token => state = "authenticated"
====
